itinerary.route: New Mexico — Crazy Cook Monument to Cumbres Pass
itinerary.overnight: Gila River Camps / Silver City / Ghost Ranch
itinerary.mapNote: Section 1/5 · New Mexico · Southern terminus Crazy Cook. Gila Cliff Dwellings hot springs. El Malpais lava fields. Most poorly-marked section. 820 miles.

itinerary.route: Colorado — Cumbres Pass to Wyoming Border
itinerary.mapNote: Section 2/5 · Colorado · The crown — Grays Peak 4352m highest point on CDT. 30+ passes above 3600m. San Juan & Weminuche Wilderness. Maximum lightning exposure. 740 miles.

itinerary.route: Wyoming — Wyoming Border to Yellowstone North
itinerary.overnight: Cirque of the Towers / Pinedale / Yellowstone camps
itinerary.mapNote: Section 3/5 · Wyoming · Wind River Range — most spectacular CDT section. Cirque of the Towers. Great Divide Basin waterless crossing. Yellowstone geysers. 500 miles.
Section 4/5 · Bitterroots & Centennials · Lemhi Pass — Lewis and Clark 1805. Centennial Mountains. Trail poorly defined. Remote and self-reliant section. 350 miles.

itinerary.route: Montana — Lima to Waterton Lake (Northern Terminus)
itinerary.mapNote: Section 5/5 · Montana · Bob Marshall Wilderness — largest roadless area lower 48. Glacier NP. Chief Mountain border crossing. Waterton Lake northern terminus. 690 miles.

waypoints.name: Crazy Cook Monument
waypoints.note: Southern terminus. A lonely monument in the New Mexico desert. The NOBO start of the CDT.

waypoints.name: Gila Cliff Dwellings
waypoints.note: 13th-century Mogollon cliff dwellings. The only wilderness hot springs on the entire CDT.

waypoints.name: Grays Peak
waypoints.note: Highest point on the CDT. A 14er. 360° view over the Colorado Rockies.

waypoints.name: Cirque of the Towers
waypoints.note: Wind River Range granite amphitheatre. One of the great wilderness campsites in North America.

waypoints.name: Great Divide Basin
waypoints.note: Hydrological anomaly — water neither flows to Atlantic nor Pacific. 100-mile waterless alternate.

waypoints.name: Yellowstone Geysers
waypoints.note: Old Faithful and the thermal fields. The CDT passes through the world's largest supervolcano caldera.

waypoints.name: Lemhi Pass
waypoints.note: Lewis and Clark's Continental Divide crossing on 12 August 1805. The CDT follows their exact route.

waypoints.name: Bob Marshall Wilderness
waypoints.note: The largest roadless area in the contiguous US. Grizzly bears, wolves, no roads for 100+ miles.

waypoints.name: Waterton Lake
waypoints.note: Northern terminus at the US-Canada border. Chief Mountain Customs. Waterton Townsite beyond.
